quality_profile.transport_and_vegetation_edges: source vector geometry retained without export simplification
quality_profile.trees: low-poly only inside vegetation zones; source positions and heights retained

runtime.load_policy: terrain COGs by visible map extent; detailed GLB tiles around the camera

spatial_contract.gltf_to_giro3d: rotate local GLB +90 degrees around X, then place at its L93/NGF origin
